patch.value: Cursor pagination and bounded-output defaults for list/search/context at scale

Bounded-output child of pm-9rxu: unbounded listings are token-catastrophic at 100k+ items. Related (not duplicate): pm-cfed lean JSON and pm-alnj search --limit shape single payloads; this defines the paging contract across read commands.

list/search/context accept a stable cursor (--after/--cursor per ADR contract) with deterministic ordering; at-scale default limits keep any single invocation under a documented token budget with an explicit truncation marker + next-cursor hint; small workspaces see no behavior change; contracts/MCP/completions/docs regenerated
